Scan with any KHQR bank app, or open ABA below (amount already set).

After you pay, tap verify — Bakong confirms automatically when the transfer is found.

ការកំណត់ផ្ទាល់ខ្លួន
How Wanderlust collects and uses your information when you explore Cambodia and use business features.
Rules for using Wanderlust — Cambodia travel discovery and business marketplace.
We do not sell your personal data.
Account email, name, saved places, and business profile sync when you are signed in.
Location is used only when you open maps or nearby places — not tracked in the background.
Built for Cambodia travel discovery, tours, rentals, and local business listings.
Traveler trip booking with businesses is arranged directly — Wanderlust is not a ticket reseller.
Sign in to save places, manage a business, and unlock full features.
Business subscription payments use KHQR via your bank apps. We do not store card numbers.

Wanderlust helps you discover temples, coast, mountains, food, tours, and local businesses across Cambodia. Business owners can list services and subscribe with KHQR. This policy explains what we collect and why.

Account name and email (to sign in), profile details you choose to share, saved places, business company info and listings you publish, and subscription payment status (plan, amount, bank reference / proof metadata). We do not store bank card numbers or PIN codes — payments happen in your bank or Bakong app.

Your data powers login, profile display, saved lists, business studio, subscription activation, and support replies. Location is used only when you open maps or nearby suggestions — not tracked in the background.

For business subscriptions we may store payment request IDs, KHQR amount, selected bank, and admin verification notes. Optional Open API checks may confirm Bakong transfers. Payment messages may be sent to the owner via Telegram for manual review when automatic verification is unavailable.

Data is stored on our cloud PostgreSQL server that powers the live Wanderlust API. We do not sell your information. We may share limited data with payment rails (e.g. Bakong / bank apps you open) only as needed to complete a transfer you start.
You can update your profile in Profile → Edit profile. To change email, delete your account, or request a data copy, contact the developer & owner (Help Center or About).
By using Wanderlust you agree to these terms. Please read them before signing in, posting listings, or paying for a business plan.

Wanderlust provides travel discovery, saved places, maps, and a marketplace for Cambodia businesses (tours, rentals, trips, and company pages). Place and listing details may change; always verify with the business before you travel or pay them directly.

Business accounts may publish listings subject to plan limits. Paid plans are billed through KHQR. A subscription activates after payment is verified (automatic Bakong check when available, or owner/admin approval). Misrepresenting services, fake listings, or payment fraud may lead to suspension.
Sign in for full access. Keep your password private. You are responsible for activity on your account, including business posts and subscription payments. Guest mode shows a limited preview only.
Do not abuse the API, attempt to access admin tools without permission, scrape data, upload harmful content, or submit false payment proofs. Admin features are restricted to authorized accounts.
We may update destinations, plans, features, or these policies. Continued use of the app means you accept the current terms. Material billing changes are shown in Business Studio before you pay.
Questions? Contact Mao SokHun — Telegram @sokhunmao, phone 0974944390 / 0885459115, or email sokhunmao390@gmail.com.

ច្បាប់ប្រើ Wanderlust
ការប្រមូល និងប្រើទិន្នន័យ
លក្ខខណ្ឌប្រើប្រាស់
ភោជនីយដ្ឋាន
ស្ថានីយ៍ប្រេង
ផ្សារទំនើប
មន្ទីរពេទ្យ
How do I save a place?
តើខ្ញុំរក្សាទុកកន្លែងយ៉ាងដូចម្តេច?
Sign in, open a suggested destination and tap Save place — or go to Saved → Add your own place to type an address, open Google Maps, and paste a link or coordinates.
ចូលគណនី បើកកន្លែងណែនាំ រួចចុច «រក្សាទុកកន្លែង» — ឬទៅ Saved → បន្ថែមកន្លែងរបស់អ្នក ដើម្បីបញ្ចូលអាសយដ្ឋាន បើក Google Maps រួចបិទភ្ជាប់តំណ ឬកូអរដោនេ។
How do I remove a saved place?
តើខ្ញុំលុបកន្លែងដែលរក្សាទុកយ៉ាងដូចម្តេច?
Open Saved, tap a place, then use Remove from saved on the detail screen.
បើក Saved ចុចកន្លែង រួចប្រើ «លុបពីបញ្ជីរក្សាទុក» នៅអេក្រង់ព័ត៌មានលម្អិត។
Does Wanderlust handle traveler booking or payment to hotels?
តើ Wanderlust គ្រប់គ្រងការកក់សណ្ឋាគារ ឬទូទាត់សម្រាប់អ្នកធ្វើដំណើរទេ?
No ticket resale for travelers. You discover places and contact businesses directly. Business owners can pay for subscription plans inside the app with KHQR.
គ្មានការលក់សំបុត្រសម្រាប់អ្នកធ្វើដំណើរ។ អ្នកស្វែងរកកន្លែង រួចទាក់ទងអាជីវកម្មផ្ទាល់។ ម្ចាស់អាជីវកម្មអាចទូទាត់ផែនការជាវក្នុងកម្មវិធីតាម KHQR។
How do I subscribe as a business?
តើខ្ញុំជាវជាអាជីវកម្មយ៉ាងដូចម្តេច?
Open Business Studio → Subscription, choose a plan, pay with KHQR in ABA, ACLEDA, Bakong, or another bank app, then wait for verification (automatic or admin approval).
បើក Business Studio → ការជាវ រើសផែនការ ទូទាត់តាម KHQR ក្នុង ABA, ACLEDA, Bakong ឬធនាគារផ្សេង រួចរង់ចាំការផ្ទៀងផ្ទាត់។
How can I reset my password?
តើខ្ញុំកំណត់ពាក្យសម្ងាត់ឡើងវិញយ៉ាងដូចម្តេច?
On the login screen tap Forgot password, enter your email, then follow the reset steps.
នៅអេក្រង់ចូល ចុច «ភ្លេចពាក្យសម្ងាត់» បញ្ចូលអ៊ីមែលរួចអនុវត្តតាមជំហានកំណត់ឡើងវិញ។
How do I contact the developer & owner?
តើខ្ញុំទាក់ទងអ្នកអភិវឌ្ឍន៍ និងម្ចាស់យ៉ាងដូចម្តេច?
Open Profile → Help Center or About. Contact Mao SokHun by Telegram (@sokhunmao), phone 0974944390 / 0885459115, or email sokhunmao390@gmail.com. You can also send a problem report from Help Center.
បើក Profile → មជ្ឈមណ្ឌលជំនួយ ឬ អំពី។ ទាក់ទង Mao SokHun តាម Telegram (@sokhunmao) ទូរស័ព្ទ 0974944390 / 0885459115 ឬអ៊ីមែល sokhunmao390@gmail.com។ អ្នកក៏អាចផ្ញើរបាយការណ៍ពីមជ្ឈមណ្ឌលជំនួយ។
ទាក់ទងអ្នកអភិវឌ្ឍន៍ និងម្ចាស់
Mao SokHun — app crash, login, KHQR payment, or business listing issues. Reach out anytime.
Mao SokHun — កម្មវិធីគាំង ចូលគណនី ការទូទាត់ KHQR ឬបញ្ហាបញ្ជីអាជីវកម្ម។ ទាក់ទងបានគ្រប់ពេល។
